I was recently laid off from my truck driver job with Pepsi. Even though I was the driver of the year, they go by seniority. I was so embarrassed to tell my family, now I'm studding several hours per day (7days p/ week) and starting to be profitable, however not consistent. Some days I lose $50, and yesterday I made $2300, most days I make between $200-$300. My goal is to never have to work for anyone again..
I love this but how would I enter the trades?

You mark the 9:30 candle when it closes; he says 9:35 because once the 9:30 candle closes, it’ll be 9:35. If you're in PST, you’re trading at 6:30 AM sharp when the market opens. I use this and it works—you just have to trust the process. Like Rolando Mario says, it's not the strategy that fails, it’s the trader who panics after a loss. Stay consistent and journal your trades. I began 5 months ago and I’ve grown a lot using Rolando’s strats!
